coverage_note: The bundled HBB population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from HBB beta-globin oxygen transport, hemoglobin tetramer assembly, erythrocyte physiology, and hemoglobinopathy biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000244734: HBB coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: HBB findings should be read against beta-globin oxygen transport, hemoglobin tetramer assembly, erythrocyte physiology, and hemoglobinopathy biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs334 (HBB HbS / Glu6Val) is curated as a HBB marker for Sickle cell disease and trait context, Beta-thalassemia and hemoglobinopathy review; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

HBB beta-thalassemia model is curated as a HBB marker for Sickle cell disease and trait context, Beta-thalassemia and hemoglobinopathy review; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
